summary: Memorable 10‑05‑1994 show, but recording details are unclear
review: One reviewer rates the performance highly, calling it one of the most memorable shows of their life and giving it five stars. The other review provides no substantive comment on sound quality or musical detail, leaving the recording source and fidelity unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews; one enthusiastic five‑star rating suggests a strong performance, but no information on recording quality limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers commented on soundboard vs. audience source or clarity of the audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed commentary on set structure or pacing was provided.
